name: Stuffed Cabbage with Lemon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil cabbage in salted water for 3-4 minutes.
2. Drain and reserve 2 1/2 cups of the water. Cool the cabbage.
3. Remove the core and 12 large leaves from the cabbage.
4. Spread the leaves out flat on a clean surface.
5. Sauté onion in 2 tablespoons of butter until softened, then mix with beef, rice, salt, and pepper.
6. Place a spoonful of the mixture in the center of each leaf.
7. Fold up the sides of the cabbage leaves to form rolls.
8. Secure each roll with a toothpick.
9. Arrange the rolls in one layer in a large pot. Add the reserved water, lemon juice, and remaining butter.
10. Cover and simmer for 1 hour.
11. Remove the cabbage rolls from the pot.
12. Mix the flour paste into the cooking liquid until thickened.
13. Cook for an additional 3-4 minutes.
14. Stir in the remaining salt and white pepper.
15. Pour the sauce over the cabbage rolls and serve.
